description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linux build that triggers on push and pull request events. The workflow consists of two jobs: prechecks and build. The prechecks job runs on ubuntu-24.04, clones DiligentCore and DiligentTools repositories, validates code format, and runs codespell. The build job depends on prechecks, runs on ubuntu-24.04 with a matrix strategy for GCC and Clang compilers, builds and tests DiligentTools with various configurations, and uploads artifacts.
